## Summary

<!-- What does this change do, and why? -->

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. "Closes #123". Delete if none. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / internal cleanup (no behavior change)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build / tooling / dependencies

## Checks

Please confirm the relevant checks pass locally (see `CONTRIBUTING.md`):

- [ ] Backend tests pass — `cd backend && python -m pytest tests/`
- [ ] Frontend tests pass — `cd frontend && npm test`
- [ ] Lint is clean — `cd frontend && npm run lint`
- [ ] Frontend builds — `cd frontend && npm run build`
- [ ] Added or updated tests for the change
- [ ] Updated documentation (README / CHANGELOG / code comments) where relevant
- [ ] No new dependency added without checking license compatibility (Apache-2.0
      compatible, no GPL/AGPL) and pinning it (see `CONTRIBUTING.md`)

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything that needs special attention, screenshots for UI changes, migration notes, etc. -->
